title: Pop Culture Warm-Up
description: A breezy mix of movies, music, TV, and entertainment staples.

questions.prompt: Which movie features the line 'May the Force be with you'?
questions.hint: It is a space saga with Jedi and lightsabers.
questions.explanation: 'May the Force be with you' is one of the signature lines from the Star Wars franchise.

questions.hint: He was often called the King of Pop.

questions.prompt: The TV series 'Friends' is set primarily in New York City.
questions.hint: The characters often gather at Central Perk.
questions.explanation: 'Friends' follows a group of friends living in New York City.

questions.prompt: What is the name of the cowboy toy in 'Toy Story'?
questions.hint: His pull-string voice is a big part of the first movie.
questions.explanation: Woody is the cowboy doll and one of the central characters in 'Toy Story.'

questions.prompt: The wizarding school in the Harry Potter series is called _____.
questions.hint: Its four houses include Gryffindor and Slytherin.
questions.explanation: Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry is the main school in the Harry Potter series.

questions.prompt: Which superhero is also known as the Dark Knight?
questions.explanation: Batman is often called the Dark Knight.

questions.prompt: Which animated film features the song 'Let It Go'?
questions.hint: The song is performed by Queen Elsa.

questions.prompt: The Beatles were originally from Liverpool, England.
questions.hint: Their hometown is strongly associated with Merseybeat.
questions.explanation: The Beatles formed in Liverpool, England.
